primary-platform-admin.findings: Strong dashboard layout: left nav, banner alert, three inline KPIs (active jobs, dead-letter, connectors) with coloured status dots, card of recent pipeline runs with pipe-IDs + rows/duration + status pills. Hierarchy clean.

populated-platform-admin.findings: Transform-applied single card with Transforming pill, State 5 label, normalization heading, four-row key-value grid. Correct but sparse — no pipeline stages, no progress bar.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Tenant admin lands on raw index browser showing ui-XXX placeholder names with created via UI form notes and Delete action — a debug grid, not a tenant-facing connector console. DynamicController fallback, not purpose-built.

primary-platform-admin.findings: KPIs collapse into stacked list with dots preserved. Pipeline cards stack vertically cleanly.

primary-platform-support.findings: ETL Inspector read-only panel: caption, tenant/connector search input, empty-state hint, Escalate link. Minimalist; no saved-search or recent-issues affordance.

primary-platform-admin.findings: Hamburger toggle, banner wraps, KPIs stack, pipeline cards truncate pipe-IDs cleanly.

primary-anonymous.findings: Centred card with event icon + title + sub-line + sign-in CTA. Balanced weight, clear hierarchy.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Attendance card with CONFIRMED + Checked-in pills, reference code, View-QR link. On-brand, communicates state cleanly.

primary-event-organiser.findings: Best view in this flow: left nav, Open-check-in-kiosk CTA, three big KPI cards (Confirmed/Waitlisted/Checked-in), RSVP table with status pills, waitlist Promote-next-in-line action. Strong purpose-built UI.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Attendance moderation with shield icon, KPI trio, RSVPs list, refund-requests section with amber heading + Approve/Reject.

populated-tenant-user.findings: Populated view is a 404 — routing/capture failure, no UI to evaluate.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Tablet keeps centred attendance card, pills legible.
Mobile centres card, pills crisp, typography scales, QR link visible.

primary-anonymous.findings: Upcoming Events: title, sign-in banner, three event cards with Sign-in-to-register CTA, Browse-all link. Good card rhythm.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Blue informational banner, Browse-events button, three event cards with Register buttons. CTA hierarchy correct.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Event Moderation with amber caption, table of pending events with PENDING_REVIEW pill + Approve/Reject. 2 rows only, no filters, no date column — under-specified.

primary-platform-admin.findings: Single card: title, caption, two KPIs (Active events 284, Pending moderation 12), Open-console link. Thin.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Event cards stack well, CTAs remain wide and tappable.

primary-anonymous.findings: Cards stack vertically with sign-in buttons spanning width.

primary-platform-admin.findings: Feature Matrix: 6 registered / 4 portable / 2 engine-internal. Six FT rows with FT-ID pill + feature name + platform-fitness pills + action buttons. Well structured.

populated-platform-admin.findings: Single Feature Registry detail card for FT-024 with Active pill, state 4, platform-adapter-installed heading, four-row key-value grid. Clean state rendering.

primary-platform-support.findings: Read-only variant: lock icon + read-only-for-support banner, same matrix with dimmed Port-to-another-platform buttons. Good role differentiation.

primary-platform-admin.findings: Matrix rows reflow, pills wrap inside cards. Action buttons right-aligned. No truncation.
LAYOUT DEFECT: FT-024 row — web-0.84 fitness pill overlaps feature name 'Event capacity overflow', truncating to 'Eve...cap...'. Same pattern on FT-031. Primary content unreadable on mobile.

primary-anonymous.findings: Shows full admin authoring UI (Validate, Publish, Create-form disabled, Usage-analytics). Create-form correctly disabled but 2x2 admin grid exposes authoring controls anonymous cannot use — weak role tailoring.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Full admin authoring: Validate, Publish-draft, Create-form, Usage-and-popularity cards, Condition-builder with variable/operator/value selects, Role-Preview panel showing visible/hidden fields per role. Strongest designed screen in this batch — purpose-built authoring tool.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Tenant user sees same authoring controls (no role-appropriate trimming) minus Published-templates picker. Role mismatch dents design quality.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Four cards reflow 2x2 to single column, condition builder stacks appropriately, role preview intact.
Cards stack, condition-builder selects full width, preview fits. Good mobile behaviour.

primary-anonymous.findings: Public Freelancer-Gigs landing: Sign-in/Create-account CTAs, four gig cards with category chip + title + price + bids + sign-in-to-bid. Colour dots on bid counts give semantic weight.

primary-freelancer.findings: Browse-and-bid: pink role banner, Open-gigs list with status pills, Submit-a-Bid panel with amount/proposal/purple Submit button. Role-specific purple accent.

primary-business-partner.findings: Post-a-Gig: validation banner green, form card with Gig-title, Total-budget, Milestones section, blue Post-Gig CTA. Live validation summary nice.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Same Post-a-Gig form without left nav (client-side posting role). Clean layout.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Gig Moderation: table with Title/Posted-by/Bids/Status/Action, POSTED pills, Remove actions.

primary-platform-admin.findings: Gig Platform Overview: title + amber banner, two fact lines (active 1247, flagged 3), Open-Gig-Ops-Console button. Single-card page feels thin; flagged rows not previewed.

primary-platform-support.findings: Gig Inspector (read-only): caption + Gig-ID search input + Search + empty-state hint + Escalate. No saved-search or recent-inspections.

primary-anonymous.findings: Gig cards reflow cleanly with category chip + price right-aligned.

primary-freelancer.findings: Open-Gigs stack vertically, Open pill on right, submit-bid inputs span width, full-width purple Submit-Bid. Strong mobile-first feel.

primary-anonymous.findings: Sign-in banner + three post cards (text + likes + sign-in-to-like-or-comment placeholder). No avatars, no author names — sparse for a social feed.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Authed: composer + four post cards with avatar initials + handle + timestamp + body + heart/comment/share with counts. Purpose-built social UI; avatars give life.

primary-tenant-admin.findings: Post Moderation Queue: amber caption + three flagged rows with title/user/pill/timestamp + Review/Dismiss actions.

primary-platform-admin.findings: Platform Content Overview: amber banner + two KPIs (flagged 24h = 47, NLP violations = 3) + console links. Single-card thinness.

populated-tenant-user.findings: Populated view is 404 — capture failure, no design to score.

primary-tenant-user.findings: Feed stacks with avatars preserved, action icons keep spacing.
Composer textarea full width, post cards stack with avatar + handle + timestamp, action row remains legible at thumb reach.

strengths: Consistent left-nav + locale-toggle shell across authed pages
Strong pill/badge system (status/role/fitness) with coherent colour semantics (green=ok, amber=warn, red=fail, blue=action, purple=freelancer-role)
Purpose-built screens for organiser (event-attendance), freelancer (marketplace bid), business-partner (post-a-gig), tenant-admin (moderation queues)
form-builder-templates tenant-admin is the batch's best purpose-built composition (four-quadrant + condition builder + role preview)
weaknesses: Two populated captures (event-attendance tenant-user, friend-request-social-feed tenant-user) resolved to 404 — populated slug/route mismatch
Platform-admin overview pages across multiple flows collapse to single thin card with 1-2 KPIs
Platform-support read-only screens are empty-state only (etl, freelancer-marketplace) — no recent-searches affordance
feature-registry mobile layout defect: fitness pills overlap feature-name text
form-builder-templates for anonymous + tenant-user exposes admin authoring controls — weak role tailoring
etl-data-integration tenant-admin view is a raw DynamicController grid, not purpose-built connector console
